commands.summary: [AC-1] src/App.tsx: onboarding walkthrough copy derives the track list from the manifest (andList over available tracks); no longer hardcodes 'CompTIA' or A+/Network+/Security+
[AC-1] Verified live: step 2 reads 'move between A+ Track, Network+ Track, and Security+ Track' and updates as tracks change
[AC-1] Trademark disclaimer and track switcher already read vendor per-track (confirmed)
[AC-2] src/content/validate.ts + scripts/validate-content.mjs: reject a duplicate idPrefix with the owning track named
[AC-2] src/content/validate.test.ts: 'rejects two tracks sharing an idPrefix' (57 tests pass)
[AC-2] npm run validate:content still green for the three real tracks
[AC-3] docs/certification-authoring.md: new 'Other Vendors (Non-CompTIA Tracks)' section (vendor flag, auto trademark/switcher, passThreshold guidance, single/multi exam, AWS example)
[AC-3] idPrefix-uniqueness rule documented; objective-mapping wording made vendor-neutral
[AC-4] 303-milestone-first-additional-certification covers choosing and authoring the first new track; 214 only makes the model/docs/validation ready.

environment.process_note: Inline acceptance-criterion evidence migrated to a formal evidence/runs record during the canonical RepoPact 1.6.0 migration (decision 0007). Original entries preserved verbatim in commands[].summary, prefixed by criterion id.
